metadata.description: PAEC GND corpus — Ground control training pairs. Phases: ground, taxi, pushback, holding, crossing, lineup. v3.1 adds 60 real PAEC12 examples from GROUND.pdf corpus. v3.2 adds holdShortTaxiwayPattern, startupPattern, improved frequencyPattern. v3.3 adds ~80 entries covering frequency readback, QNH/ATIS/wind, intersection departure, backtrack, and complex multi-taxiway routing. v3.4 fixes JSON malformation, adds 112 entries (QNH readback, RPLL compound taxiways E1-F3-G2, conditional clearances, phonetic freq errors, ASRS patterns), adds 3 new CHECKS patterns (qnhPattern, conditionalPattern, windPattern), 2 new error types (qnh_not_confirmed, conditional_clearance_not_confirmed). v3.5 fixes 5 analyzer bugs (contextualWeight worst-error, B737 false taxiway match, frequency string normalization, pushback left/right directions, QNH phonetic readback), adds wind_not_confirmed error type, fixes validateChecks for optional patterns, appends ~120 entries targeting phase imbalance (lineup/crossing/pushback/holding) — all new entries appended, zero existing entries modified.
